feed.title: blank
feed.subtitle: A simple, whitespace theme for academics. Based on [*folio](https://github.com/bogoli/-folio) design.

entry.title: Functorial Neural Architectures from Higher Inductive Types

link.title: Functorial Neural Architectures from Higher Inductive Types

entry.summary: How we prove that compositional generalization is equivalent to a structural property of the decoder — and build architectures that have it by construction.
